```{r}
#| label: modality-setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
})
options(warn = 2)                                    # promote any chunk warning to a render error (gate-critical)
targets::tar_source()                                # constants, plot theme + modality figure helpers
targets::tar_load(modality_scatter_figures)          # compact logFC pairs + functional group scores
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
theme_set(theme_tau())

msf <- modality_scatter_figures
```

::: {.figure-print-block}

<h2 class="figure-heading">Figure 6</h2>

```{r}
#| label: plot-geomx-sample-heatmap
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 9
#| fig-alt: "GeoMx AOI track atlas with AOI columns clustered by five displayed DAM marker-gene expression tracks and branch-ordered by mean DAM z-score, with genotype plus shared no-versus-yes tau and amyloid tracks above B2m, Apoe, Ctsd, Tyrobp, and Trem2; no spatial, QC, replicate, ROI, or expression heatmap tracks are displayed."
geomx_sample_heatmap_plot(msf$descriptive$GeoMx$sample_heatmap)
```

:::

::: {.figure-print-block}

<h2 class="figure-heading">Figure 7</h2>

```{r}
#| label: plot-modality-bulk-context
#| fig-width: 15.6
#| fig-height: 16
#| fig-alt: "Bulk modality context figure vertically stacking a genotype-coloured phospho protein-group sample PCA above a genotype-grouped heatmap of top phosphosite abundances across runs."
bulk_modality_context_plot(msf$descriptive$Proteome, msf$descriptive$Phospho)
```

:::

::: {.figure-print-block}

<h2 class="figure-heading">Figure 8</h2>

```{r}
#| label: plot-modality-amyloid-effect
#| fig-width: 13.9
#| fig-height: 16.8
#| fig-alt: "Four scatter plots, one per panel (snRNAseq, GeoMx, and one bulk TiO2 phospho assay at protein-group and phosphosite levels), each comparing the amyloid log fold change between the two tau backgrounds on a shared square coordinate scale; a large text note labels the dotted threshold bands as absolute off-diagonal distance |x-y| greater than or equal to 3.5 log2FC, all threshold-passing points are labelled, GeoMx has no threshold-passing labels, and phosphoproteomics is collapsed to parent proteins."
scatter_lim <- max(vapply(msf$order, function(m) {
  d <- msf$panels[[m]]$data
  max(abs(c(d$x[is.finite(d$x)], d$y[is.finite(d$y)])), na.rm = TRUE)
}, numeric(1)))
scatter_lim <- if (is.finite(scatter_lim) && scatter_lim > 0) scatter_lim else 1
label_counts <- vapply(msf$order, function(m) {
  nrow(modality_scatter_label_rows(msf$panels[[m]]$data, label_col = "label"))
}, integer(1))
if (any(label_counts >= 80L)) scatter_lim <- scatter_lim * 1.08
panels <- lapply(msf$order, function(m) {
  modality_interaction_scatter(msf$panels[[m]]$data, title = msf$panels[[m]]$title,
                               xy_lim = scatter_lim)
})
wrap_plots(panels, ncol = 2) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "threshold: |x-y| >= 3.5 log2FC",
    theme = ggplot2::theme(
      plot.caption = ggplot2::element_text(
        size = tau_report_base_size * 1.2,
        hjust = 0.5,
        colour = "#333333",
        margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 8)
      )
    )
  )
```

:::

::: {.figure-wide-inline .figure-print-block}

<h2 class="figure-heading">Figure 9</h2>

```{r}
#| label: plot-modality-functional-scores
#| fig-width: 18.8
#| fig-height: 12.8
#| fig-alt: "Faceted dumbbell plots show categorized modality-specific functional groups for off-diagonal genes or proteins after removing uncategorized fallback buckets and small aggregate differences; priority-ordered GO term-family buckets separate complement or MHC terms, phagocytosis terms, and chemotaxis terms before broader cell-cell-adhesion, extracellular-matrix, motility, and immune residual buckets; each category label lists every scored feature retained for that category in at most two feature lines, and paired points for aggregate NLGF_MAPTKI and NLGF_P301S amyloid responses are connected by a segment coloured by log2FC difference."
functional_group_score_plot(msf$groups$summary, title = "Off-diagonal functional groups")
```

:::
